name: 36"x24" Coastal Landscape Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Transform your living space with the charming 36"x24" Coastal Landscape Wall Art from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This piece features a serene landscape depicted through block print and drawing techniques, framed in a warm walnut brown tone. Crafted from durable material, it combines artistry with conscious material choices. The horizontal orientation makes it an ideal centerpiece for any room, adding a touch of tranquility and sophistication to your decor.

Threshold™ designed w/Studio Mcgee: Looks like home, feels like you.
